name: 4pk 5" x 3" LED Flameless Black Wick Candle Cream - Threshold™: Wax Pillar Decor, Battery Operated, Safe Ambiance
description:
Each space in your home with glow in elegance with this Four-Pack 5" x 3" LED Flameless Black Wick Candle from Threshold™. This four-pack of flameless candles looks like pillar candles, with an LED bulb inside each candle. The candles are made with unscented wax and easily light up with the included remote. With a realistic black wick, these cream candles add a warm and inviting touch to your decor — simply place them above the mantel, entryway or any other flat surface.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
